# Hotel Shiva Continental, Mussoorie

> Family-run 3-star deluxe hillside hotel in Kulri, Mall Road, Mussoorie, Uttarakhand, India — a 2-minute walk from Mall Road and Picture Palace, on the road toward Landour. Welcoming guests since 20 May 1989. 37 cozy rooms, many with valley-facing views, an upcycled garden (Gardenica), and the Deodar Kitchen multi-cuisine restaurant. A frequent choice for families, student groups, couples and travel agents planning Mussoorie trips.

Address: Kulri, Mall Road, Mussoorie, Uttarakhand 248179, India
Phone: +91 70422 88289 | WhatsApp (bookings & B2B): +91 70605 02380
Email: sales@shivacontinental.in | Agents: shivacontinentalmussoorie@gmail.com
Website: https://www.shivacontinental.in/

## Why guests choose it

- Location: 2 minutes from Mall Road and Picture Palace — hill views with the market at walking distance
- Family-run since 1989 (founded by two brothers; managed by Mr. V.K. Sanghal; sons Shubham and Naman run systems and training today)
- Gardenica: an upcycled garden where planters are made from old kettles, shoes and buckets
- Deodar Kitchen: homestyle North Indian and Chinese food, breakfast buffet, in-room dining
- Complimentary breakfast with all rooms; free Wi-Fi; lift access to all floors; power backup; doctor on call

## For families

- Family rooms sleep 2 adults + 2 children: Suite With Balcony (300 sq.ft., separate living area, hill-facing balcony) and Super Deluxe With Balcony (240 sq.ft.)
- Baby chair in restaurant, extra mattress on request, board games at reception
- Indoor recreation area: table tennis, carrom; garden for evenings

## For student groups & group trips

- Family-run since 1989 — over three decades of hosting student and family groups in Mussoorie
- Group buffet available at the in-house restaurant
- Indoor play zone (TT, board games), easy bus access, calm surroundings
- Dedicated bookings team from pre-arrival to checkout; lift access on all floors
- Limited parking (confirm in advance), taxi support

## For travel agents (B2B)

- A preferred partner for travel agents across North India
- Competitive B2B rates with a firm rate-parity commitment; rate sheet shared on inquiry only
- Real-time WhatsApp coordination: +91 70605 02380 (send travel dates, room count, guest type)
- Booking ID + GST invoice on confirmation; full support for FITs and groups

## Rooms (6 categories)

- [Suite With Balcony](https://www.shivacontinental.in/room-suite-balcony.html): 300 sq.ft., king bed, separate living room, hill-view balcony, 2 adults + 2 children
- [Super Deluxe With Balcony](https://www.shivacontinental.in/room-super-deluxe-balcony.html): 240 sq.ft., king bed, private balcony, 2 adults + 2 children
- [Executive With Balcony (Non-View)](https://www.shivacontinental.in/room-executive-balcony.html): 200 sq.ft., king bed, balcony, 2 adults + 1 child
- [Deluxe With Balcony (Non-View)](https://www.shivacontinental.in/room-deluxe-balcony.html): 150 sq.ft., king bed, balcony with partial view, 2 adults
- [Deluxe Non View](https://www.shivacontinental.in/room-deluxe-nonview.html): 200 sq.ft., king bed, 2 adults + 1 child
- [Economy Room](https://www.shivacontinental.in/room-economy.html): 80 sq.ft., double bed, budget stays

All rooms include: complimentary breakfast, tea & coffee maker (daily refill), mineral water, Wi-Fi, TV, wardrobe, room service, laundry service. Most also have a mini bar and in-room dining.

## Booking

Book directly at https://www.shivacontinental.in/booknow (Djubo booking engine), by phone +91 70422 88289, or WhatsApp +91 70605 02380.
Check-in: 1:00 PM · Check-out: 10:00 AM.

## Find us on booking platforms

The same hotel is listed as "Hotel Shiva Continental, Mussoorie" on:

- [MakeMyTrip](https://www.makemytrip.com/hotels/hotel_shiva_continental-details-mussoorie.html) — rated 3.8/5 by 870+ guests (as of mid-2026)
